sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from e_eventsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#

select * from e_eventsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
order by fssj desc

select count(*) from e_eventsinfo_t ev LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ev.cdtid=ct.id where ev.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
ct.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
($sql$)
ev.etitle like '%$etitle$%'
ev.sjgk like '%$sjgk$%'
ev.sfbwd like '%$sfbwd$%'
ev.xwfs like '%$xwfs$%'

select ev.*,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName order by bm.id) as cdttypename,ct.cdtname,ct.cdtlevel from e_eventsinfo_t ev LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ev.cdtid=ct.id LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) where ev.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
ct.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
($sql$)
ev.etitle like '%$etitle$%'
ev.sjgk like '%$sjgk$%'
ev.sfbwd like '%$sfbwd$%'
ev.xwfs like '%$xwfs$%'
GROUP BY ev.id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_eventsinfo_t (cdtid,etitle,fxdj,sjgk,sfbwd,fssj,ssrs,sfgm,xwfs,xcczjg,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo,workinfoid,attachments) VALUES ($cdtid$,'$etitle$','$fxdj$','$sjgk$','$sfbwd$','$fssj$','$ssrs$','$sfgm$','$xwfs$','$xcczjg$',$validflag$,$addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$',$workinfoid$,'$attachments$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_eventsinfo_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids from(SELECT * FROM e_eventsinfo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
select count(*) from e_eventsinfo_t where validflag>0 and workinfoid = $workinfoid$

select count(*) from zfw_e_eventsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#

select * from zfw_e_eventsinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
workinfoid = #workinfoid#
order by fssj desc

select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids from(SELECT * FROM zfw_e_eventsinfo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_e_eventsinfo_t SET validflag = $validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
